caribbean.headline: Strong Winds and Rain Impact Roatan Today
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing sustained winds of 24 kt with wave heights reaching 6.7 ft and a dominant swell direction from the ENE at a 10-second period. Rain probability is 50%, indicating a moderate chance of showers impacting the Western Caribbean while Martinique sees lighter winds near 13 kt with less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Lisbon Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing heavy rain with an 88% rain probability alongside moderate winds up to 12 kt and wave heights reaching 3.2 ft from a WSW swell direction with a 7-second period. Meanwhile, Mykonos sees winds increasing to 23 kt but less than 10% rain probability, posing less immediate impact than the western Mediterranean conditions.
